headline: UnitedHealth Expands Doula Support As 2026 Margin Recovery Plan Takes Shape
summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) is expanding national access to doula support for millions of members in employer-sponsored health plans. The company is positioning non-clinical, preventive maternity care as a core feature of its benefits design to address outcomes and costs. Management is reaffirming a 2026 margin recovery plan that includes repricing, cost controls and AI-driven efficiencies following margin pressure in 2025. Optum Health normalization is identified as a key element in the...
